item.name: Button
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Button primitive preserving native disabled, focusable disabled, non-native role, and keyboard activation semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema and Option for the serializable options and event mapping.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

item.name: Progress
item.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Progress primitive preserving root, label, track, indicator, value, ARIA, state data attributes, value clamping, formatting, and indeterminate semantics.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema for the serializable Progress options, parts, and status values.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

deviations.summary: Progress label association uses an explicit labelId option instead of React-managed context.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless and do not use hidden mutable context; callers provide a stable labelId so root aria-labelledby and label id remain explicit and deterministic.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Badge examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: Spinner example uses a local inline SVG instead of an installable shadcn Spinner component.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/spinner as an installable registry item. The example-local SVG preserves the origin spinner slot, status role, and icon placement.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.

deviations.summary: Input Group example uses fixture-local static Input Group shell classes instead of an installable shadcn Input Group component.

deviations.summary: Tooltip example uses fixture-local static ButtonGroup and Tooltip shell classes instead of installable sibling components.
deviations.rationale: This batch intentionally does not add shadcn/button-group or shadcn/tooltip as installable registry items. Static shells preserve the origin DOM slots and visual classes without adding tooltip behavior.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local RTL constants preserve the default rendered direction while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
